face.structure: heart-shaped with a subtly pointed chin, high cheekbones that lend an impression of maturity tempered with youthful smoothness.

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a slight upward tilt at the outer corners enhancing an insightful, curious look.
eyes.color: soft hazel with flecks of gold and green, creating a gentle contrast and an intriguing depth.
details: long, dark lashes adding to the intensity and mystique
highlights strategically placed near the bottom rim to suggest warmth and receptivity
eyes.expression_effect: curious yet enigmatic, often giving the impression of being lost in thought

face.expression: subtle and composed, with a relaxed mouth hinting at warmth and a furrowed brow suggesting contemplation and latent anxiety.

skin.tone: fair with a faint porcelain quality
skin.undertone: cool with hints of pink, offsetting any severe boldness
skin.texture: smooth with a youthful radiance, suggestive of careful skincare
skin.rendering_notes: soft gradient shading to highlight the cheekbones and jawline, underscoring her attentive expressiveness

hair.color: jet black with a natural sheen catching the light to add dimension
hair.style: straight with layered ends that fall just below the shoulders
hair.flow: lightly tousled, with a slight inward curl near the chin framing her face
details: a single streak of violet hidden beneath the dominant layers, peeking through per movements

character.aura: a delicate mix of elegance and mystery, suggesting an unspoken depth and inner world

outfit.base: a sleek tailored sweater dress, slightly fitted to highlight a silhouette of poised grace
outfit.design: minimalist with subtle intricate embroidery along the cuffs and neckline
details: a small silver pendant hanging from a simple necklace
a thin, modern bracelet on her right wrist, suggesting a blend of contemporary and personal style
outfit.fit: comfortable yet sufficiently snug to convey sophistication

composition.framing: mid shot emphasizing the upper-body, allowing a view of expression and attire
composition.pose: standing with a slight lean towards the left, right arm casually resting at her side while the left hand tucks a lock of hair behind the ear
composition.gesture: an open posture indicating readiness to engage, with subtle movements suggesting restlessness

background.color_palette: muted pastels and warm tones creating a tranquil atmosphere
background.details: blurred silhouettes of gentle flowing drapes, suggesting a private, serene environment
background.rules: keep the focus on the character while providing context through soft color transitions and abstract shapes
